title: rondeletia rugelii
intro: Rondeletia rugelii, also known as Rugel's honeysuckle or wild honeysuckle, is a flowering plant species native to the southeastern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Rondeletia rugelii include reducing inflammation and relieving congestion, making it a valuable natural remedy for various respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its efficacy.
